requiredOptions.mountTarget: injected node exposing appendChild and removeChild

optionalOptions.title: popup title; defaults to Confirmar cotización
optionalOptions.onEditRequested: called with pending preview after Editar
optionalOptions.formatFieldValue: optional pure formatter for displayed values

returnShape.open: open(preview) mounts one popup with the eight canonical fields
returnShape.close: close(reason) unmounts the popup and clears pending preview

authorizedFlow: create popup elements only through injected documentLike
append one popup root to injected mountTarget only when open(preview) is called
store exactly one pending preview while the popup is open
render the eight canonical fields in the approved order
create exactly two action buttons: Editar and Aceptar
bind those two created buttons through bindQuotePreviewConfirmationUiSurface
Aceptar delegates to the completed confirmed-persistence stack
Aceptar closes the popup only after successful persistence
Editar performs zero persistence, invokes onEditRequested, and closes the popup
close clears pending preview and removes popup-owned listeners and nodes
dispose is idempotent and permanently disables reopening
requiredTests: open mounts exactly one popup root
root has dialog semantics and modal state
render exactly eight canonical fields in approved order
render exactly two buttons labeled Editar and Aceptar
opening while already open replaces no node and updates pending preview deterministically
Aceptar persists through the existing surface binding stack
Aceptar closes only after successful persistence
Aceptar failure leaves the popup open and calls onError
Editar performs zero store writes and zero store reads
Editar calls onEditRequested with the pending preview
close clears pending preview and unmounts the root
no route, page, dashboard, generic-host, direct localStorage, or backend creation is introduced
forbiddenChanges: any runtime source file other than the two allowed files
full page, route, screen, dashboard, shell, or application host
generic UI host or reusable modal framework
global window or global document lookup
promotion of PDF extraction to official quote truth

dependencyContract.documentPolicy: documentLike must be injected; global document lookup is forbidden
dependencyContract.mountPolicy: popup mounts only into the injected mountTarget
dependencyContract.storePolicy: official store is injected and forwarded; popup creates no backend
